summary: Frontend testing of mobile-friendly rework and Booking Details modal. Public booking flow on 390x844 works end-to-end (confirmed ref WTB-6WKH65AC). Admin login and layout are usable at 390px with no horizontal overflow. My Account SMTP fields render on mobile without overflow. Add Admin modal opens and closes via Escape. HOWEVER, the core Booking modal has critical gaps versus the spec: (a) the dedicated Close button with data-testid 'close-booking-modal' is NOT present in Bookings.jsx, (b) clicking the dark backdrop does NOT close the modal in normal user interaction (both mobile 390px and desktop 1920px), and (c) action buttons on mobile do NOT stack — the grid is fixed 'grid-cols-3 gap-3' so Confirm/Complete/Cancel are cramped 84px columns instead of the promised 'grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3'. X-button close, Escape close, body-scroll-lock, status-unchanged-after-close, modal centering (desktop top≈344/1080, mobile top≈179 with content scroll) all work correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing dedicated Close button with data-testid 'close-booking-modal' — spec required, code has none (grep confirms). Users only have the round X, Escape, and (broken) backdrop.

Actions grid is 'grid grid-cols-3 gap-3' — on 390px mobile this renders three 84px buttons side-by-side (cramped). Spec required 'grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3' so Confirm/Complete/Cancel stack vertically on mobile.

Backdrop click does not close the modal in normal user interaction. The 'relative min-h-full flex …' wrapper covers the backdrop <div> in DOM order and has no onClick, so pointer events on empty space hit the wrapper not the backdrop. Verified on both 1920x1080 desktop and 390x844 mobile — clicking at (5,5)/(10,10) leaves modal open; only a JS .click() on the backdrop node itself dismisses it.

issues: Three action buttons compressed into ~84px columns; label text wraps awkwardly. Should stack vertically.

action_items: Add a visible 'Close' button with data-testid='close-booking-modal' inside the Booking Details modal (wire to setActive(null)).
Change the actions grid in /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/Bookings.jsx from 'grid grid-cols-3 gap-3' to 'grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-3' so buttons stack on mobile.

Fix backdrop click in /app/frontend/src/components/admin/ui.jsx Modal: move onClick={onClose} onto the outer scroll container OR onto the flex wrapper (with e.target===e.currentTarget guard), because the current backdrop <div> is visually behind the wrapper and never receives clicks in normal use.
critical_code_review_comments: ui.jsx Modal: current DOM order is backdrop → wrapper. Both are siblings inside a fixed inset-0 container; wrapper is 'min-h-full' so it covers the full area, intercepting all clicks. Backdrop close is effectively dead. Recommended fix: attach onClose to the outer <div className='fixed inset-0 z-50 overflow-y-auto'> with an e.target===e.currentTarget check, or use the same pattern on the flex wrapper.
Bookings.jsx: 'grid grid-cols-3 gap-3' contradicts the review-request contract (which claims grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3). Same file also lacks the promised close-booking-modal button.
Bookings.jsx `openDetail` uses `setActive(b)`. When status is patched via setStatus, active is updated locally with the new status — good. StatusBadge inside modal reflects the change immediately.
seed_data_creation: Created one pending public booking (WTB-6WKH65AC, TEST_MobileUser, test_mobile@example.com) via the mobile flow — used to exercise the admin Bookings modal. No admins created (max-4 rule respected).
context_for_next_testing_agent: After E1 adds the 'close-booking-modal' button, fixes the actions grid to grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3, and fixes backdrop close in ui.jsx, retest: (1) each of {X, Escape, backdrop, Close-button} closes booking-modal without changing status, (2) on 390px viewport action buttons render as single-column stack, (3) other modals (type-modal at /admin/appointments, admin-modal at /admin/admins) still close via X/Escape/backdrop. Seed booking WTB-6WKH65AC is still pending and can be reused; cancel/complete/confirm buttons on it were NOT clicked during this run.
rca of the issue: Modal backdrop close is broken because the sibling flex wrapper (`relative min-h-full flex …`) overlays the transparent backdrop <div> in the same fixed container; only the (invisible) backdrop node has onClose, and it never receives pointer events from empty regions of the wrapper. Close button + mobile actions stacking are simply not implemented in Bookings.jsx (grep for 'close-booking-modal' returns no matches, and the actions grid is a plain 'grid-cols-3').
